text: When a runtime test requires a physical document that is not available (e.g. NIE green card), use a layered verification approach: (1) unit test the normalization/classification logic with mock inputs covering all branches; (2) do a live API test with a similar available document to confirm the pipeline end-to-end works; (3) confirm the frontend data path handles the specific document kind correctly via code review. This approach provides high confidence without the actual physical document.
issue: D1.8 - NIE card upload test without physical NIE document
